findings.criterion: Each Gherkin step has a concrete step implementation that performs the described setup (page load & visibility), executes an HTML5-style drag-and-drop by constructing and dispatching DragEvent/DataTransfer, and verifies cart DOM fields (.box2/.box3/.box1) under #div1.

evidence.quote: When the user drags the product with data-testid "product-item-1" and drops it into the cart container with data-testid "drop-area"

findings.reasoning: The Behave steps present implement the Given (page load and visibility), When (drag_and_drop_html5 called with the product and drop-area elements), and Then assertions that search #div1 .box2, #div1 .box3, and #div1 .box1 for title, price, and quantity. The drag implementation constructs a DataTransfer and dispatches dragstart/dragenter/dragover/drop/dragend events in-page, which is a valid mechanism to trigger application drop handlers. The verification steps assert DOM text under #div1 selectors that match the requirement's expected observables.
